repos.name: .archive
repos.description: Archived repositories with full commit history and metadata

latestRelease.name: Release v1.0.0
latestRelease.description:
## Changes in v1.0.0

### Initial Release
- fix(lint): remove unused imports from setup_org.py (ffe249f)
- feat(governance): complete GitHub optimization and CI/CD enforcement (689078b)
- fix(ci): resolve all lint errors and test failures (6220957)
- feat(structure): add template-based structure enforcement system (4651fb9)
- fix(workflows): graceful handling when organizations/ is gitignored (d2fed5c)
- docs(adr): add architecture decision records and cleanup (704b0d5)
- docs(archive): transform To-Claude.md into clean documentation (55c0a53)
- style(docs): apply consistent theme across all README files (bbd6a30)
- fix: restore personal profile README, move governance to .metaHub (dc184b5)
- feat(governance): complete Golden Path governance system (Phases 1-9) (28a4a95)
- refactor(structure): enforce pure governance contract - move docs to .metaHub/ (f71f6db)
- feat(templates): complete template system for profiles, orgs, and repos (b743023)
- docs(phase-3): complete strategic deployment with SLSA and Allstar (c3276be)
- feat(phase-2): implement portfolio-wide governance enforcement system (69748df)
- refactor: transform to pure governance contract (ruthless cleanup) (59a6372)
- docs(consumer): add comprehensive consumer guide and update README (d74913c)
- feat(examples): add complete example consumer repository for governance contract validation (1c04b71)
- docs(governance): finalize status documentation for governance contract (970aec0)
- feat(allstar): add OpenSSF Allstar security governance and clean up documentation (de6583a)
- docs(readme): update to reflect reusable workflows complete status (2a34773)

---
*Full Changelog: https://github.com/alaweimm90/alaweimm90/compare/...v1.0.0*


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alaweimm90/alaweimm90/commits/v1.0.0

repos.name: neper
repos.description: LLM training, alignment, evaluation & synthetic data platform. Measuring excellence in natural units.

latestRelease.name: v0.1.0 — Initial Release
latestRelease.description:
## Neper v0.1.0 — Initial Release

**Measuring LLM excellence in natural units.**

### Features

- **Data Pipeline** — DAG-based with deterministic SHA-256 caching, Pydantic schema validation, and append-only versioning
- **Training** — SFT and DPO loss functions with checkpoint-integrated training loop
- **LoRA** — Parameter-efficient fine-tuning as a first-class citizen
- **Safety & Alignment** — Differentiable penalty constraints visible in training curves
- **Checkpointing** — Atomic saves with rotation and crash recovery
- **Monitoring** — Structured metrics (JSONL + Prometheus), distributed training context (NCCL/DDP)
- **Evaluation** — Perplexity and benchmark harness with regression testing
- **Synthetic Data** — Temperature-controlled generation with quality filtering and deduplication
- **CLI** — \
eper-train\, \
eper-eval\, \
eper-synth\ entry points with \--demo\ mode
- **Docker** — Multi-stage Dockerfile (dev, train, eval targets)
- **CI/CD** — GitHub Actions for lint, type-check, and tests (Python 3.10/3.11/3.12)

### Quick Start

\\\ ash
pip install -e .
neper-train --demo        # toy training with gpt2
neper-eval --model gpt2   # perplexity benchmark
neper-synth --mock         # synthetic data generation
\\\

### Stats

- 58 passing tests
- 20 source modules across 5 subpackages
- 3 example configs + sample datasets
